_note: Re-run 2026-06-29 (local macOS pure-headless) for the ADV-1 O0 decision. Confirms the flag-only vsync uncap does NOT free-run rAF below one refresh in pure headless: uncapped median 17.4ms is not < 16.67ms. subRefreshProven:false stands and is recorded honestly. The capped control locks clean at 16.7ms/60fps. The quantised over-budget oracle (overbudget_probe_local.txt) is the adopted method per PRF-ADV1-DECISION.md.
verdict: FAIL: uncapped median 17.4ms not < 16.67ms -> cap NOT broken in pure headless; no SUB-REFRESH frame-time number is valid. The vsync-quantised over-budget oracle (16.7/33.3/50ms buckets) is the adopted 30fps verdict method per PRF-ADV1-DECISION.md.
